# NON-CANONICAL COPY — DO NOT EDIT

> **This directory (`jenkins_repo_docs_final/`) is a historical snapshot and is
> no longer the authoritative location for any project files.**

## Canonical locations (as of 2026-03-04)

All files that were once located here have been promoted to their canonical
root-level positions:

| Was here | Canonical location now |
|---|---|
| `jenkins_repo_docs_final/CLAUDE.md` | `/CLAUDE.md` |
| `jenkins_repo_docs_final/README.md` | `/README.md` |

## What this directory is

An unmodified snapshot retained for git history traceability. The canonical
root-level files may diverge from this copy as corrections are applied.

## Recommended cleanup

This directory should be **deleted** in a future cleanup commit once all team
members have confirmed they are reading from the canonical root-level paths.
Do not perform that deletion as part of an active feature branch; schedule it
as a standalone housekeeping commit on `main`.

## Do not edit this directory

Any edits made here will be ignored. All AI agents and team members must
reference only the root-level canonical files listed above.
